demographic_profile.summary: Oil and gas field operations workers are hands-on professionals who work directly with production equipment, safety systems, and instrumentation in challenging outdoor environments across multiple geographic regions. They prioritize proven reliability, safety compliance, and durability when purchasing equipment, as equipment failure can result in safety hazards, environmental incidents, or costly production downtime. They are frustrated by equipment that fails prematurely in harsh conditions, lacks proper safety certifications, or requires frequent maintenance that disrupts operations.
